scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,admin,merchant,api,worker -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:merchant" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm --workspace services/api run build && npm --workspace services/worker run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/admin run build && npm --workspace apps/merchant run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace services/api run lint && npm --workspace services/worker run lint
